zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Empson於1466年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾堂可斯特時，他的父親Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy16歲，母親Jane de Plumpton21歲。他於1486年與Ethelreda Wolston在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1490年在英國英格蘭享年24歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Empson于1466年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾堂可斯特时，他的父亲Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy16岁，母亲Jane de Plumpton21岁。他于1486年与Ethelreda Wolston在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1490年在英国英格兰享年24岁。

nameMeanings.name: Empson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: metronymic meaning ‘son of Emma’, from the Middle English female personal name Em(e), Emme (see Imm ) + -son.
shortened form of Emerson . The two names were no doubt confused, and it is possible that the reverse process sometimes occurred, whereby Em(m)erson was an altered form of Emmeson, i.e. Em(p)son.

variants.name: Imeson
meanings: English: variant either of Emmeson (see Empson ) or of Emerson .

variants.name: Impson
meanings: English (Norfolk): variant of   Empson  . This form of the surname is now more common in the US than in Britain.

variants.name: Imm
meanings: German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Im(m)o, a pet form of names based on Irmin-, a divine or ethnic name formed with irmin, ermen ‘whole, entire’.

English (Wiltshire): from the ancient Germanic female personal name Imma, Emma, of the same origin as in 1 above. In Old English Imma, Emma was borne by both males and females. In Middle English, under Norman influence, the personal name Emm(a), Imm(a) came to be used almost exclusively for women, being taken as a short form of Ermingard.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Empson was born in 1466, in Towcester, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy, was 16 and his mother, Jane de Plumpton, was 21. He married Ethelreda Wolston in 1486, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1490, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 24.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Empson est né en 1466, à Towcester, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Jane de Plumpton, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Ethelreda Wolston en 1486, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1490, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 24 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Empson 1466 in Towcester, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy 16 und seine Mutter Jane de Plumpton 21. Er hat 1486 in London, Middlesex, England Ethelreda Wolston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1490 im Alter von 24 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Empson è nato il nel 1466 nel Towcester, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Jane de Plumpton, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Ethelreda Wolston nel 1486, nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1490, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 24 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Empsonが1466年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアトウセスターで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchyは16歳，母Jane de Plumptonは21歳であった。1486年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでEthelreda Wolstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1490年にイギリスイギリスで24歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Empson(이)가 1466년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 타우스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane de Plumpton(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1486년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Ethelreda Wolston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1490년 영국 잉글랜드에서 24세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Empson nasceu em 1466, em Towcester, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Jane de Plumpton, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Ethelreda Wolston em 1486, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1490, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 24 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Empson родился в 1466 г. в местности тоусестир, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane de Plumpton, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Ethelreda Wolston в 1486 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1490 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 24 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Empson nació en 1466, en Towcester, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Jane de Plumpton, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Ethelreda Wolston en 1486, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1490, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 24 años.
